mapper.sql: SELECT indicator_id, indicator_code, indicator_name, indicator_type, parent_code, is_derived, computation_pattern, input_codes, calculation_weight, sort_order, create_time, update_time FROM jw_indicator_config
mapper.select: WHERE indicator_type = #{indicatorType} ORDER BY sort_order, indicator_id

SELECT t.* FROM jw_indicator_config t WHERE t.indicator_type = #{indicatorType} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jw_indicator_config c WHERE c.parent_code = t.indicator_code ) ORDER BY t.sort_order, t.indicator_id
WHERE parent_code = #{parentCode} ORDER BY sort_order, indicator_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_indicator_config ( indicator_code, indicator_name, indicator_type, parent_code, is_derived, computation_pattern, input_codes, calculation_weight, sort_order, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{indicatorCode}, #{indicatorName}, #{indicatorType}, #{parentCode}, #{isDerived}, #{computationPattern}, #{inputCodes}, #{calculationWeight}, #{sortOrder}, now(), now() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_indicator_config WHERE indicator_id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE jw_indicator_config SET parent_code = #{newCode} WHERE parent_code = #{oldCode}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_indicator_config ( indicator_code, indicator_name, indicator_type, parent_code, is_derived, computation_pattern, input_codes, calculation_weight, sort_order, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.indicatorCode}, #{item.indicatorName}, #{item.indicatorType}, #{item.parentCode}, #{item.isDerived}, #{item.computationPattern}, #{item.inputCodes}, #{item.calculationWeight}, #{item.sortOrder}, now(), now())
